page.title: Ferretti 94: Best Boat in Marbella for Ultra-luxury weeklong charter

data.meta_description: The Ferretti 94 is the best boat in Marbella for ultra-luxury weeklong charter. 29m, 12 pax, departs Puerto Banús. Book your supreme escape today.
data.summary: The Ferretti 94 is the best boat in Marbella for an ultra-luxury weeklong charter. This 29-metre, 12-passenger flybridge yacht departs from Puerto Banús, offering supreme comfort and space for extended cruising.
key_facts: 29 metres (95 ft) of Italian luxury flybridge yacht.
Sleeps up to 12 guests in 5 en-suite cabins.
Ideal for weeklong charters exploring Costa del Sol.
Includes licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and VAT.
Onboard jet ski available for thrill-seeking guests.

faq.q: What makes the Ferretti 94 the best boat for a weeklong charter in Marbella?
faq.a: The Ferretti 94’s 29-metre length provides exceptional interior volume and exterior deck space, making it perfect for extended stays. With five en-suite cabins accommodating up to 12 guests, you have private quarters for everyone. The flybridge offers panoramic views, while the main saloon and aft deck are ideal for dining and relaxing. This combination of space, luxury, and range makes it superior for weeklong itineraries.

faq.q: How many guests can the Ferretti 94 accommodate?
faq.a: The Ferretti 94 can host up to 12 guests on day charters and overnight trips. It features five en-suite cabins, including a full-beam master suite, a VIP cabin, and three twin/double cabins. This layout is ideal for families or groups of friends seeking privacy and comfort during a weeklong cruise.

faq.q: What is included in the Ferretti 94 charter price?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). For the Ferretti 94, pricing is on request via WhatsApp, so you get a tailored quote based on your itinerary and duration.

faq.q: Where does the Ferretti 94 depart from?
faq.a: The Ferretti 94 departs from Puerto Banús, Marbella’s iconic superyacht marina. This location gives you immediate access to the best cruising grounds along the Costa del Sol, including Marbella’s Golden Mile, Cabopino, Estepona, and even Gibraltar for longer weeklong trips.

faq.q: Can we bring our own food and drinks on the Ferretti 94?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own provisions. The yacht has a fully equipped galley and ample refrigeration. However, our standard charter already includes a selection of drinks and snacks. For special dietary needs or premium catering, just let us know when booking via WhatsApp.

faq.q: Is the Ferretti 94 suitable for large events or parties?
faq.a: The Ferretti 94 is designed for luxurious, comfortable cruising, not loud parties. While it has spacious decks for socialising, we recommend it for refined gatherings, corporate events, or family celebrations. For high-energy parties, consider our Mangusta 80 which includes a jet ski for added fun.

faq.q: What destinations can we visit on a weeklong Ferretti 94 charter?
faq.a: A weeklong itinerary from Puerto Banús can include stops at Marbella Marina, Cabopino, Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, Estepona, Sotogrande, and even Gibraltar. The Ferretti 94’s range and comfort allow you to explore the Costa del Sol at a relaxed pace, anchoring in secluded coves and dining at exclusive beach clubs.

faq.q: How do I book the Ferretti 94?
faq.a: Booking is simple: contact us via WhatsApp on our website. Provide your preferred dates, number of guests, and any special requests. We will respond with a custom quote and availability. For other boats, you can book directly online, but the Ferretti 94 requires a personalised consultation.

data.body_html:
The Ferretti 94 is the best boat in Marbella for an ultra-luxury weeklong charter. At 29 metres (95 feet) and accommodating 12 guests, this Italian flybridge yacht redefines comfort and style on the Costa del Sol. Departing from Puerto Banús, it offers unparalleled space, five en-suite cabins, and a host of premium features. Whether you are celebrating a milestone or simply escaping the ordinary, the Ferretti 94 delivers a supreme experience that smaller yachts simply cannot match.

Why the Ferretti 94 is the best boat for a weeklong charter

Length is the defining factor when you plan to live aboard for seven days. At 29 metres, the Ferretti 94 provides generous interior volume and multiple outdoor lounges. The flybridge is a standout feature: a shaded upper deck with a wet bar, sun pads, and dining area. The main saloon opens onto the aft deck, creating a seamless indoor-outdoor flow. With five en-suite cabins, including a full-beam master suite, every guest enjoys privacy. This makes it the Ferretti 94 best for families, corporate groups, or friends who value their own space.

Onboard features and inclusions

Every charter aboard the Ferretti 94 comes with a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). The yacht is equipped with a jet ski, adding thrill to your days at anchor. The galley is fully fitted, and the crew ensures seamless service. For pricing, please contact us via WhatsApp — we will tailor a quote to your exact itinerary and duration.

Ideal itineraries for a weeklong cruise

Departing from Puerto Banús, the Ferretti 94 can explore the entire Costa del Sol. A typical week might include:

  • Day 1-2: Cruise to Marbella Marina and anchor at Cala del Faro.
  • Day 3-4: Head west to Estepona and Cala Cortés for crystal-clear waters.
  • Day 5: Visit Sotogrande, the exclusive port with top restaurants.
  • Day 6: Cross to Gibraltar for a unique cultural stop.
  • Day 7: Return to Puerto Banús, enjoying a final sunset dinner on board.

This itinerary is flexible — your skipper will adjust based on weather and preferences. The Ferretti 94’s range and comfort make it the best boat for such extended adventures.

Comparing the Ferretti 94 with other fleet yachts

Our fleet includes several excellent yachts, but the Ferretti 94 stands out for weeklong charters. The Mangusta 80 (24m) is ideal for day trips with a jet ski, while the Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m) suits shorter stays. The Ferretti 94’s 29-metre length and five cabins provide the space and privacy needed for a full week aboard. For smaller groups, the Azimut 39 (12.5m) or Astondoa 40 (12.5m) are cost-effective options, but they lack the overnight capacity and luxury of the Ferretti 94.

Pricing and booking the Ferretti 94

Unlike our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) which have fixed rates from €749 for 2 hours, the Ferretti 94 is priced on request. This allows us to offer a custom quote based on your specific needs — number of days, desired itinerary, and any additional services. To book, simply send us a WhatsApp message with your dates and group size. We will respond promptly with availability and a tailored price. For other boats, you can book directly online, but for the Ferretti 94, a personal consultation ensures the perfect experience.

What guests love about the Ferretti 94

Guests consistently praise the Ferretti 94’s spacious flybridge, the quiet and powerful engines, and the attentive crew. The ability to sleep 12 in en-suite cabins means no one sacrifices comfort. The jet ski adds a playful element, while the stabilisers ensure a smooth ride even in moderate seas. The yacht’s design by Studio Zuccon International Project is both elegant and functional, making it a favourite among discerning charterers.

Book your weeklong Ferretti 94 charter today

If you are looking for the Ferretti 94 best for an ultra-luxury weeklong charter in Marbella, you have found it. Contact us via WhatsApp to begin planning your supreme escape. For more inspiration, explore our full fleet of yachts departing from Puerto Banús.

The Ferretti 94’s 29-metre length provides exceptional interior volume and exterior deck space, making it perfect for extended stays. With five en-suite cabins accommodating up to 12 guests, you have private quarters for everyone. The flybridge offers panoramic views, while the main saloon and aft deck are ideal for dining and relaxing. This combination of space, luxury, and range makes it superior for weeklong itineraries.

How many guests can the Ferretti 94 accommodate?

The Ferretti 94 can host up to 12 guests on day charters and overnight trips. It features five en-suite cabins, including a full-beam master suite, a VIP cabin, and three twin/double cabins. This layout is ideal for families or groups of friends seeking privacy and comfort during a weeklong cruise.

What is included in the Ferretti 94 charter price?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). For the Ferretti 94, pricing is on request via WhatsApp, so you get a tailored quote based on your itinerary and duration.

Where does the Ferretti 94 depart from?

The Ferretti 94 departs from Puerto Banús, Marbella’s iconic superyacht marina. This location gives you immediate access to the best cruising grounds along the Costa del Sol, including Marbella’s Golden Mile, Cabopino, Estepona, and even Gibraltar for longer weeklong trips.

Yes, you are welcome to bring your own provisions. The yacht has a fully equipped galley and ample refrigeration. However, our standard charter already includes a selection of drinks and snacks. For special dietary needs or premium catering, just let us know when booking via WhatsApp.

Is the Ferretti 94 suitable for large events or parties?

The Ferretti 94 is designed for luxurious, comfortable cruising, not loud parties. While it has spacious decks for socialising, we recommend it for refined gatherings, corporate events, or family celebrations. For high-energy parties, consider our Mangusta 80 which includes a jet ski for added fun.

What destinations can we visit on a weeklong Ferretti 94 charter?

A weeklong itinerary from Puerto Banús can include stops at Marbella Marina, Cabopino, Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, Estepona, Sotogrande, and even Gibraltar. The Ferretti 94’s range and comfort allow you to explore the Costa del Sol at a relaxed pace, anchoring in secluded coves and dining at exclusive beach clubs.

How do I book the Ferretti 94?

Booking is simple: contact us via WhatsApp on our website. Provide your preferred dates, number of guests, and any special requests. We will respond with a custom quote and availability. For other boats, you can book directly online, but the Ferretti 94 requires a personalised consultation.
